The '''DC0040 speeder''' was a civilian [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] model developed by [[Daystar Craft]] in the late [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Advertised as the '''"Intergalactic"''' for its [[Starship/Legends|starship]]–like appearance, the DC0040 was later replaced by the [[DC0052 speeder]], which was utilized by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
The DC0040 speeder was a civilian issued personal [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] developed and manufactured by [[Daystar Craft]]; the DC0040 featured a number of design cues similar to those of a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and had a high power–to–weight ratio.

==History==
Released by Daystar Craft in the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the DC0040 speeder was advertised under the moniker "Intergalactic", which promoted the DC0040's power and [[Starship/Legends|starship]]–like design. DC0040 was successful, and the "Intergalactic" name would later be carried on to the DC0040's successor, the [[DC0052 speeder]], which was used exclusively by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Behind the scenes==
The DC0040 speeder was first mentioned in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]] winning entry for the DC0052 speeder in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] contest, "[[What's The Story?]]," which allowed fans to write certain aspects of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' saga. The DC0052 entry was written by [[Nathan Butler]]—under the alias Nathan (ChronoRadio)—and "'[[The Dark Moose]]," although "The Dark Moose" provided most of the entry's information, including the paragraph in which the DC0040 is mentioned. The DC0040 was later mentioned in Daystar Craft's entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
